creator: tmseck@web.de
text:
My reply to niels@ below from Sep 12 below. I have not received any
reply, unfortunately.


> That's a known issue since 3.1.6, unfortunately. The listed files should
> be in ...errors/sr-latn/ but the directory is empty. I have not had time to
> properly track this one down or to fix/work around it. There are no
> files left in the system after deinstallation (at least not according to
> my local tinderbox runs).
> 
> Best,
> -- 
> Thomas-Martin Seck

Could someone please commit this port as is? I'll try to track down why
3.1 fails to install the sr-latn error files properly. This problem is
causing the complains about non-existing files at deinstallation time
that Niels refers to.
